top.name: Primordial Surge
top.rules_text: Imbue ALL tiles in radius 4 with a random element. Deal 4 damage to every enemy for each unique element they are adjacent to.

bottom.name: Cataclysm
bottom.rules_text: Remove imbuement from all tiles in radius 4. Deal 2 damage per tile cleared. Draw 1 card per 3 tiles cleared.

upgrades.description: Primordial Surge deals more per adjacent element. Cataclysm deals more per tile.

changes.value: Imbue all tiles in radius 4 randomly. Deal 5 damage per adjacent unique element.
Remove imbues in radius 4. Deal 3 damage per tile cleared. Draw 1 per 3 tiles.

upgrades.description: Chaos: Primordial Surge radius grows to 5.

changes.value: Imbue all tiles in radius 5 randomly. Deal 5 damage per adjacent unique element.

upgrades.description: Reset: Cataclysm draws more cards per tiles cleared.

changes.value: Remove imbues in radius 4. Deal 3 damage per tile. Draw 1 per 2 tiles cleared.

upgrades.description: Elemental Madness: Enemies adjacent to 3+ element types are stunned.

changes.value: Imbue all tiles in radius 5 randomly. Deal 5 damage per adjacent element. Enemies adjacent to 3+ elements are stunned.

upgrades.description: Cleansing Fire: After clearing tiles, imbue them all with Fire.

changes.value: Remove imbues in radius 5. Deal 3 damage per tile. Draw 1 per 2. Then imbue all cleared tiles with Fire.

upgrades.description: Primordial Catastrophe: The surge becomes apocalyptic — maximum radius, all elements, massive damage.

changes.value: Imbue all tiles in radius 6 randomly. Deal 7 damage per adjacent element. Enemies adjacent to 2+ elements are stunned.

upgrades.description: Eternal Cycle: Cataclysm and re-imbue happen simultaneously — destroy and rebuild.

changes.value: Remove imbues in radius 6, deal 4 per tile, draw 1 per 2. Then immediately imbue all cleared tiles randomly, dealing 3 per adjacent element.
